series_description:
Audits and reviews performed by Internal Auditing on internal
operations. Includes related correspondence, reports, requests for
information, ERS raw data, notes and work papers that support the
audit. Includes Audit Quality Assurance Reviews, Audit Follow-ups and
Risk Assessments.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years
comments: AC = Publication or release of final audit findings.

series_description:
Includes opinions and/or advice from ERS Legal Counsel or the Attorney
General and any requests eliciting the opinions.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include legal opinions or advice rendered on
a matter in litigation or with regard to pending litigation. See
Litigation Files AIN 1023 in GC. ARCHIVAL NOTE: Opinions and
advice that set legal precedent or exhibit historical value will be
evaluated by the Archives and Information Services Division of
the Texas State Library and Archives Commission for archival
preservation. At the end of the retention period, send to
Records & Information Management for archival review to
determine archival transfer requirements.
legal_citation:
TGC 552; TGC
815.503(a); and Tex.
Insurance Code,
1551.063.

series_description:
Reports pertaining to workload monitoring, task completion times,
number of contacts, and similar activities.
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include Reports on Performance Measures,
AIN 1006 in FN.

series_description:
Copies of all proposed, revised, withdrawn, emergency, and adopted
rules; open meetings notices; auctions; or any other documents
required by law to be submitted to the Texas Register.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years

series_description:
Required by the General Appropriations Act. Includes encumbrances
and documentation about budget transfers and revisions, as well as
detail charts of accounts.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Instructional materials usually developed at the division level by or for
ERS for internal staff or external customers. Includes presentation
materials, handouts, job aids, class rosters, sign-in sheets, course
outlines, and similar training aids used in external training programs,
etc.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year
comments:
NOTE: Does not include Training Administration Records, AIN
2255 in HR or Hazardous Materials Training Records, AIN 2519 in
OS.

series_description:
Contracts, leases, and agreements include general obligation, land
lease, utilities, and construction except for buildings, includes
amendments and renewals. Documents include all contract related
specifications, affidavits of publication of calls for bids, performance
bonds, contracts, purchase orders, inspection reports, and
correspondence. May also include other applicable documentation in
the master contract file per CPA Procurement and Contract
Management Guide. Also, Includes documents used to monitor
compliance.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years
comments:
See related Bid Documentation AIN 1136a, AIN 1136b in GS. For
building construction contracts see Building Construction
Contract Inspection Records, AIN 2473 in OS. Also, see Contract
Log, AIN 1116 in GC.

series_description:
List of agency contracts, leases, and agreements including general
obligation, land lease, utilities, and contruction contracts.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_title:
Mail and Telecommunications Listings and
Directories
series_description:
Any mailing address, telephone or fax number, or e-mail address
records maintained by ERS on its employees or on entities or persons it
serves.
retention_statement: Until Superseded

series_description:
Office and work space layouts; modular furniture drawings created by
vendor supported tools.
retention_statement: Until Superseded

series_description:
Information related to maintenance service. May include service logs,
operating information, system requirements, configurations,
installation, moves, service, repair, etc.
retention_statement: Life of Asset plus 3 years
comments:
LA = End of fiscal year in which equipment is disposed. For
service agreements or contracts related to equipment repairs
and service, see Contracts and Leases, AIN 1115 in GS. For
vehicle maintenance records, see Inspection Repair and
Maintenance Records - Vehicles, AIN 2538.

retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_description:
Forms completed by external mechanical service personnel for
installation or repair. Includes billing code, service, labor, parts, and
remarks.

Awarded and unawarded related information: Includes solicitation
requisition/authorization, solicitation, qualified responses (defined as
those passing the preliminary review phase), and response
tabulation/evaluations. Associated with a contract executed, renewed,
or amended on or after September 1, 2015.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years
comments:
See related Contracts and Leases, AIN 1115 in GS and Building
Construction Contract and Inspection Records, AIN 2473 in OS.

series_description:
Awarded and unawarded related information: Includes solicitation
requisition/authorization, solicitation, qualified responses (defined as
those passing the preliminary review phase), and response
tabulation/evaluations. Associated with a contract executed, renewed,
or amended on or before August 31, 2015.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years
comments:
See related Contracts and Leases, AIN 1115 in GS and Building
Construction Contract and Inspection Records, AIN 2473 in OS.

series_description:
Unqualified responses that do not meet submission requirements and
are not included in evaluation process (e.g. withdrawn, missed
submission deadline, incomplete submission, etc.)
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_description:
Requests for information preliminary to the procurement of goods or
services by direct purchase or bid.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments:
CAUTION: If the request for information leads to request for
proposal or bid, see Solicitation Documentation – 9/1/2015 and
After, AIN 1136a, Solicitation Documentation – 8/31/2015 and
Prior, AIN 1136b, Solicitation Documentation - Unsuccessful
Responses, AIN 1137 in GS.

series_title:
Health Insurance Portability and
Accountability Act (HIPAA) Compliance
Documentation.
series_description:
Documentation of agency compliance with HIPAA. Includes forms
required by HIPAA to be provided to all participants that leave the
Group Benefits Plan (GBP) to use when obtaining health insurance.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years

series_description:
Logs used to register persons appearing before ERS as required by
Chapter 2004, Texas Government Code, including quarterly reports filed
with the Texas Ethics Commission.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_description:
Includes related correspondence, investigations, reports, studies,
analyses, and recommendations. Indicates funding determinations for
the plan year and provides required financial statement disclosure and
reporting information required by Governmental Accounting Standards
Board (GASB).

Documents collected or generated as part of the process of reviewing
other state agency internal audit programs (peer review). Includes but is
not limited to self-assessments, worksheets, surveys or questionnaires,
evaluations, and other documents as described in the State Agency
Internal Audit Forum (SAIAF) Peer Review Manual. Also includes auditor
independence statements, charters, and annual reports.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years
comments:
After final report has been issued. See Audits - External IA 1004,
Audits - Internal IA 1005 for individual Audit records not related
to the peer review of an Audit Plan.

series_description:
Records documenting collection of social security taxes and payment to
the Social Security Administration (SSA) during the years, 1977 to 1987,
when ERS managed this program for the SSA.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_title: ERS Board of Trustees - Member Files
series_description:
Includes biographical sketches and resolutions; oaths of office; list of
member names, term dates, and whether elected or appointed;
orientation packet, fiduciary responsibilities, and other guidance
information.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years

series_description:
Audio and computer screen images recording conversations between
customers and contact center agents.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_title:
Recorded Call Center Information - Quality
Monitoring Records
series_description:
Audio recordings of conversations between customers and contact
center agents.

Includes complaint, tracking records, complaint analysis,
correspondence, and resolution/response.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
CAUTION: If a complaint becomes the subject of litigation,
records transfer to Litigation Files, AIN 1023 GC.

series_description:
Calendars, appointment books or programs, and scheduling or itinerary
records, purchased with state funds or maintained by staff during
business hours that document appointments, itineraries, and other
activities of ERS officials or employees. Includes electronic calendars.
retention_statement: Calendar Year End plus 1 year
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only the calendars, appointment, and itinerary
records of elected officials, executive staff, board or commission
members, division directors, and program heads require archival
review. Contact the State Archives when these records have met
their retention periods. CAUTION: A record of this type
purchased with personal funds, but used by a state official or
employee to document his or her work activities may be a state
record and subject to this retention period. See Open Records
Decision 635 issued in December 1995 by the Attorney General.

series_description:
Incoming/outgoing and internal leadership, supervisory, managerial,
executive, administrative, substantive, and other high-level
correspondence in any media, pertaining to the formulation, planning,
implementation, interpretation, modification, or redefinition of the
programs, services, or projects of ERS and the administrative
regulations, policies, and procedures that govern them.
comments:
CAUTION: This records series to be used for correspondence not
included in other records series.
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only the administrative correspondence of
executive staff, board members, division directors and program
heads require archival review. At the end of the retention
period, send to ERS Records & Information Management for
archival review to determine archival transfer requirements.

series_description:
Non-administrative incoming/outgoing and internal correspondence, in
any media, related to the routine operations of the policies, programs,
services, or projects of ERS. General Correspondence. Ex: general
inquiries, requests for materials.
comments:
CAUTION: This records series to be used for correspondence not
included in other records
series.
See comment to AIN 2029 (Correspondence - Administrative).

series_description:
Records that are not part of another records series and are required
only for a limited period of time; e.g., routine messages recorded on
any medium, such as voicemail, fax, e-mail, hard copy, etc.; telephone
message notifications; internal meeting notices; routing slips;
transmittals that add nothing of substance to enclosures; and other
routine information not used to document an agency transaction.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments:
Frequent, regular disposal is encouraged and expected. Records
destruction does not have to be documented.

series_title:
ERS Board of Trustees - Election Files -
Returned and Invalid Ballots
series_description:
Ballots that were mailed to members and returned due to incorrect
address or other reasons. Also includes invalid ballots.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 90 days

series_title: ERS Board of Trustees - Election Files
series_description:
Records of general and runoff elections. Includes petitions, candidate
information, ballots, tallies and results. May include correspondence
and meeting notes.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Forms signed annually by ERS Executive Director, Deputy Executive
Director, Board of Trustee members including Investment Advisory
Committee members, Investment Division staff, and Investment
Accounting staff, stating that they will follow the ERS Code of Ethics.
Also includes personal financial statements and affidavits of the
Executive Director.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years
comments:
Personal financial statements and affidavits of the Executive
Director are filed annually with the Ethics Commissio

series_description:
List or log of records indicating final disposition. Shows records series
title, dates of records, method of disposition, and date of disposition.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 10 years

series_description:
Subpoenas for production of evidence produced for litigation in which
the state agency is not a party. Includes legal documents requiring
recipient to appear in court to testify, or to produce records to be used
in litigation. Includes member requests. Does not include PIA requests.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year
comments:
For subpoenas related to litigation in which the state agency is a
party, see Litigation Files, AIN 1023 in GC.

series_description:
Documentation used to provide and improve access to records. Includes
indexes, card files, shelf lists, registers, guides, and other finding aids.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments:
CAUTION: These records must carry the same retention period
and archival code of the records they support.

series_description:
Notes, memoranda, or reports relating to employee counseling.
Maintained at the supervisor level.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_title:
Legislative Session Files - Bills Proposed By
or Affecting ERS
series_description:
Includes drafts, correspondence, bill, author, fiscal notes, amendments,
substitutes, resolutions, analyses and reports, impact statements,
LBB/ERS research, final TSL tracking report, information from author
and Legislative Council, and a certified copy of the bill as passed.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 30 years

series_title:
ERS Board of Trustees and Committees -
Meeting Agenda and Minutes
series_description:
Official agenda and minutes of open meetings as defined by
Government Code, Chapter 551. Includes Agenda and Minutes of
Investment Advisory Committee meetings.
retention_statement: Permanent
comments:
Microfilmed through 5/2010. Master stored at TSLAC. Duplicate
maintained in agency. CAUTION: This records series and AIN
2070, AIN 2073, and AIN 2076, must be used for those state
boards, committees, commissions, and councils, which by law or
the biennial Appropriations Act, are administered by another
state agency. These records and all others related to the
functions of any of these dependent entities must be included in
the records retention schedule of the administering agency.
ARCHIVAL NOTE: The archival requirement is met by sending
copies to the Archives and Information Services Division, TSLAC.
Send copies to TSLAC and LRL as soon as certified.

series_title:
ERS Board of Trustees and Committees -
Agenda Books
series_description:
Includes agenda items and supporting documentation, exhibits,
attendees registration, public meeting notice, correspondence,
handouts, public comment cards, presentation slides, and unofficial
minutes, etc. Includes documents made available to BOT members and
committee members in advance of meetings for briefing purposes,
some of which may not be submitted at an actual meeting. Includes
Investment Advisory Committee Agenda Books.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 20 years
comments:
See caution comment ERS Board of Trustees and Committees -
Meeting Agenda and Minutes AIN 2066 in EO. ARCHIVAL NOTE:
At the end of the retention period, transfer to Archives and
Information Services Division, TSLAC.

series_title:
ERS Board of Trustees and Committees
Meetings - Audio and Video Recordings
series_description:
Audio and video recordings and transcriptions of open meetings of the
Board of Trustees and committees.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 20 years

series_title:
ERS Board of Trustees Meetings - Certified
Agendas and/or Recordings of Executive
Sessions
series_description:
Certified agendas or recordings of closed meetings of the ERS Board of
Trustees and committees.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
See caution comment ERS Board of Trustees and Committees -
Meeting Agenda and Minutes AIN 2066 in EO.

series_description: Documents pertaining to class action participation.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_description:
News, press releases, or any public relations files maintained or issued
by ERS. Includes print, electronic, audio, and audiovisual records.
comments:
ARCHIVAL NOTE: At the end of the retention period, send to
Records & Information Management for archival review to
determine archival transfer requirements.

series_description:
Copies of certain information used for research on a particular topic,
gathered from many different sources, including parts of other records
series, that are maintained if considered necessary for future use.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable

series_description:
Plans and records relating to the process of planning new or re-defined
programs, services or projects of ERS.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
ARCHIVAL NOTE: At the end of the retention period, send to
Records & Information Management for archival review to
determine archival transfer requirements TSLAC. Data
processing planning records are not archival.

series_description:
Any document that officially initiates, rescinds, or amends general office
procedures.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 5 years

series_description:
Includes settlement agreement that are not considered settlement
agreements associated with litigation or member records.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments:
NOTE: Records involving litigation or ERS members are not
included in this records series, See Litigation Files AIN 1023 in GC
or Individual Benefit Records AIN 2607 in CB

series_title:
Risk Management Manual and Safety
Committee Records
series_description:
Risk Management manual and Safety Committee records and other
records documenting risk avoidance.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Records of the goals, accomplishments, and award calculations
documenting that eligible employees have met their goals.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years

series_description:
Original notes or text of speeches, papers, or reports delivered in
conjunction with agency work.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
ACHIVAL NOTE: At the end of the retention period, send to
Records & Information Management for transfer to Archives and
Information Services Division, TSLAC.

series_description:
Includes minutes or notes, and supporting documentation taken at
internal agency staff meetings.

Includes reviews and reports, recommendations, issues, status reports,
back up documentation, meeting notes and agency self-study.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 15 years
comments:
ACHIVAL NOTE: At the end of the retention period, send to
Records & Information Management for transfer to Archives and
Information Services Division, TSLAC.

series_description:
Criminal history record information on job applicants or agency
employees obtained from the Department of Public Safety (DPS).
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments:
CAUTION: An agency that is authorized to obtain a criminal
history record information from DPS must refer to its agency's
legislation or see Subchapter F, Chapter 411, Government Code
for appropriate retention and use of this information.

series_description:
Contains only current forms and/or templates approved for use in the
agency.
retention_statement: Until Superseded
Fiscal Year End plus 1 year

series_description:
Includes correspondence, comments, changes, drafts, final versions,
and approvals for each form developed for use.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
NOTE: No longer in use means no forms remaining in Individual
Benefit Records,AIN 2607 in CB.

series_description:
Includes records transferred to and from storage or transfer of legal
custodian. Includes records permanent check-out forms.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
NOTE: Transmittals from the state records center and in ERS
system are eligible. Agency form ERS 6.57, Inactive Transmittal
form will be maintained 2 years from transmittal number
assignment.

series_description:
Background material, copy (drafts), original artwork, photo negative,
prints, flats, etc. This includes all work performed both inside and
outside the agency. To include content used on a web or publishing
server such as web pages.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments:
ARCHIVAL NOTE: At the end of the retention period, send to
Records & Information Management for archival review to
determine archival transfer requirements.

series_description:
Information in any format that is produced by the authority of or paid
for by ERS for public distribution and not subject to another retention
period in this schedule (ex: news releases, meeting agendas, and
financial reports). To include content used on a web or publishing server
such as web pages.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
CAUTION: Many state publications must be submitted to the
Texas State Publications Depository Program, TSLAC. May
include records in Social Media.
legal_citation:
TGC 441.103-441.105.
For requirements for
Internet publications,
see 13 TAC 3.1-3.8

series_description:
Files needed for electronic data audits such as files or reports showing
transactions accepted, rejected, suspended, and/or processed; history
files/tapes; records of on-line updates to application files or security
logs. Includes network security audits.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments:
NOTE: For records involving health information subject to
HIPAA, the retention period for compliance documentation is six
years from the date the record was created or the date it was
last in effect, whichever is later.

series_description:
Relatively long-lived computer files containing organized and consistent
sets of complete and accurate electronic records and associated
processing file. Examples include, but are not limited to, data tables of
relational databases used by applications or computer programs.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments:
CAUTION: Records management officers must be certain before
assigning the retention period of AC to agency master files and
application data that the files do not fall under records series
listed elsewhere.

series_description:
Information verifying the quality of system, hardware, or software
operations including records of errors or failures and the loss of data
resulting from such failures, correction of errors or deficiencies,
documentation of abnormal termination and of error free processing,
checks of changes put into production, transaction histories, and other
records needed as an audit trail to evaluate data accuracy.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_title:
Software Registrations, Warranties and
License Agreements
series_description:
Records documenting the registration and licensing of a software
application to activate the software for legal use by the end users of a
state agency, along with warranties providing that the software will
perform in accordance with functional specifications.
retention_statement: Life of Asset plus 3 years
comments: LA = End of fiscal year in which asset is disposed.

series_description:
Requests for IS services to diagnose and resolve computer problems
and the documentation of problem resolution. Help Desk tickets.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_description:
Investigations conducted by staff. Includes complaints filed with Equal
Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) or Texas Commission on
Human Rights TCHR) and investigations of fraud.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_title:
Documentation or Verification of
Employment Eligibility
series_description:
Includes employment federal reporting form (Immigration and
Naturalization Service (INS) I-9).
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
CAUTION: Federal regulation requires that INS I-9 forms be
retained for 3 years from date of hire or 1 year after separation
of employee, whichever later. INS I-9 forms for employees who
terminate from the agency less than 3 years from the date of
hire must be kept for the 3 year retention period.

series_description:
Records relating to the review of employee grievances against
personnel policies, working conditions, etc.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
Does not include formal complaints filed by an agency employee
with the Equal Employment Office (EEO) of the U. S. Department
of Labor. See AIN 1023.

series_description:
Forms used to deposit employee’s earnings into a specified personal
account.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_description:
Documentation used to start, modify, or stop all voluntary or required
deductions from payroll, including garnishment or other court-ordered
attachments. Includes child support, deferred compensation,
investment agreements, etc. ERS only.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Records and documentation relating to unemployment compensation
claims, including reimbursement of funds disbursed by Texas Workforce
Commission (TWC). Includes Texas Workforce Commission (TWC)
reports.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years

series_description:
Earnings records for ERS employees and working JRS payroll
(Consolidated History Report). Contains year-to-date wages and
deductions, taxable wages, insurance, TexaSaver, net pay etc.
ERS copy of Employee's Withholding Exemption Certificate.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Records defining the wage or salary rate for each position in the agency
expressed in dollars, grades, or step numbers.

Any reports compiled by the agency on aspects of personnel staffing,
including listings of all staff by program or name; staff hired during a
month; detailed listings of employees within the organizational
structure, position vacancies, analysis of turnover rates and seasonality
of employment, labor statistics, minority status, payroll status, etc. May
include supporting documentation.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 5 years

series_description:
Includes manuals, changes and memos for Group Benefit Plan, Health
Maintenance Organization (HMO's), Consolidated Omnibus Budget
Reconciliation Act (COBRA), TexFlex etc.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 1 year
comments: Until superseded or plan terminated.

series_description:
Reports, studies, aggregated or summary data, and similar
documentation compiled to monitor and demonstrate compliance with
the federal Equal Pay Act.

Contains information needed to verify employment. Includes name,
social security number, exact dates of employment, last known address,
and most recent public access option form. Also, includes Non-
Disclosure Agreements (NDAs).
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 75 years
comments:
NOTE: These records (except for NDAs) are pulled from
Individual Employee Personnel Records, AIN 2202 in HR, at the
end of the retention period.

series_description:
Instructional materials and other records associated with in-house
training of agency personnel. Including but not limited to training
manuals, course registration, class rosters, sign-in sheets, syllabuses,
course outlines, and similar training aids.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include Hazardous Materials Training
Records, AIN 2519 in OS.

series_description:
Documentation for monthly report: Agency/Institution Insurance
Premium Due/Premium Paid. Files include transmittals, transaction
entries, adjustments, insurance account summaries, correspondence
with agencies and institutions.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years

series_description:
Records documenting the investment of any public funds that evidence
the investment of such funds, the cancellation or withdrawal of
investments, and similar activities.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 5 years
comments:
See Financial Reporting and Tracking Records for reports
associated with investments, AIN 1111 in GS.

series_description:
Documentation relating to the capital and fixed assets of a state agency,
including equipment or property. Includes copies of purchase orders,
invoices, and vouchers to document purchase, journal entries to
support depreciation and disposition, and reconciliations to Statewide
Property Accounting (SPA).
retention_statement: Life of Asset plus 3 years
comments: LA = End of fiscal year in which asset is disposed.

series_description:
Those authorized to distribute payroll warrants, to receive warrants
from the State Comptroller, and to access agency bank accounts.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Records created to track items. It could be used to track incoming or
outgoing correspondence, materials shipped or received, or to assign a
unique number to a document. Also used to track work assignments.

Assessments or evaluations of the value of state-owned buildings or
property.
retention_statement: As Long as Administratively Valuable
comments:
ARCHIVAL NOTE: At the end of the retention period, send to
Records & Information Management for transfer to Archives and
Information Services Division, TSLAC.

retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years
comments:
See also Building Construction Contract and Inspection Records,
AIN2473 in OS. ARCHIVAL NOTE: At the end of the retention
period, send to Records & Information Management for archival
review to determine archival transfer requirements.

series_description:
Spreadsheets, schematics, drawings, lists, charts showing locations,
configurations, relationships, and/or assignments of technology
resources. Excludes any related to security.
retention_statement: Until Superseded

series_title:
Estimate Files (Supply and Repair Cost
Estimates)
series_description:
Quotes for minor construction and repair projects and supplies.
Includes supporting documentation, as applicable.

Physical inventory of all capitalized equipment performed annually,
including reconciliation with accounting records. Includes Lost and
Stolen Property Reports, Certificates of Property Destruction, Surplus
Property Sale Reports, and Damage Reports. Includes supply usage:
inventory of supplies and equipment, used for preparation of purchase
order.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years
comments:
Physical Inventory is submitted annually to State Comptroller of
Public Accounts. Lost and Stolen Property Reports are filed with
the Office of the Attorney General.

series_description:
Accident or occupational disease reports (by supervisors and
employees) and other associated reports required to be submitted to
the Texas Department of Iinsurance (TDI) or maintained internally on
accident frequency. Also includes reports sent to and received by State
Office of Risk Management (SORM).
retention_statement: Calendar Year End plus 5 years
comments: TDI retains copies of the reports submitted to it for 50 years.

series_description: Plans for evacuation of agency facilities in cases of emergency.
retention_statement: Until Superseded

series_description: Includes documentation of privacy and/or security incidents.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years

series_description:
Risk analyses of departmental and enterprise-wide objectives and
activities.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 7 years

series_description:
Plan that provides information to employees about the hazardous
chemicals to which they may be exposed to in their workplace.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 5 years

series_description:
Records of training given employees in an agency hazard
communications program.
comments:
See Individual Employee Personnel Records, AIN 2202 for
individual employee training records.

series_description:
Fire, safety, and other inspection records of agency facilities and
equipment. Includes Fire Orders issued by Fire Marshall to correct
deficiencies in complying with the fire code.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include inspection reports of building
construction. See Building Construction Contract and Inspection
Records, AIN 2473 in OS.

series_description:
Safety Data Sheets (SDS) that list information relating to occupational
safety and health for the use of various substances and products.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_description:
Authorizations for access to the building and within the building and
access to information resources.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years
comments:
Retention period complies with Comptroller of Public Accounts
(CPA) Confidential Tax/Vendor Information Agreement and User
Agency Agreement retention policies.

series_description:
Logs, registers, or similar records documenting visitors to limited access
or restricted areas of agency facilities. Includes temporary visitor stick-
on badges issued by the Front Desk. Also, includes Data Center Access
Log.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description: List of each hazardous chemical normally present in the workplace.
comments: Texas Health and Safety Code 502.005(d).

retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_description:
Includes mileage, fuel/oil consumption, passengers carried and other
related operational information.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Vehicle titles, registration information, and owner manuals for state
vehicles.
retention_statement: Life of Asset
comments: LA = End of fiscal year in which asset is disposed

series_description:
Includes the name and type of grievance, payment of claim denials,
correspondence, dates documents received, grievance paragraph
letters, requests to vendor for information supporting decision, etc.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year
comments:
NOTE: At the end of the retention period, transfer to Records
Management. The file is maintained with Individual Benefit
Records, AIN 2607 in CB.

series_description:
All documentation to establish, deny, modify, continue or end benefits
provided under ERS programs, except those listed elsewhere on this
schedule. Includes records such as but not limited to: affidavits,
appeals, applications, approvals, authorizations, agreements,
calculations, cancellations, certificates, complaints, contracts, court or
legal documents, designations, correspondence, decisions, elections,
employment or earnings history, envelopes, estimates, ledgers,
extension of benefits requests, medical records, military service records,
notes, notifications, opinions and advice, receipts, reports, requests,
reviews, selections, statements, terminations, verifications, vouchers,
waivers, worksheets.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 30 years

series_description:
Routine communications that are not required to provide ERS insurance
and pension benefits. Examples are account balance letters, annuity
verification letters, and statements of retirement benefits.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 5 years

series_description:
Information related to a service purchase for which no payment has
been received (past the due date, as long as status is not partial
payment, purchased or errored).
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 months
comments:
NOTE: Correspondence included in Individual Benefit Records,
AIN 2607 in CB.

series_description:
Information related to an application for retirement that has been
canceled and no annuity payments have been paid.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 30 days
comments:
NOTE: Correspondence included in Individual Benefit Records,
AIN 2607 in CB.

series_description:
Includes error listings, bank and home mail, and direct deposit of retiree
checks, etc. Other listings include addresses used for mailing and
payment and does not include eligible county.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 1 year
comments:
NOTE: Correspondence is included in Individual Benefit Records,
AIN 2607 in CB.

series_description: Report for each fund, listing warrants issued, amount, date, etc.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description:
Consists of vendors that are active, on hold and removed. Contains
vendor agreements; product information; correspondence; telephone
transfer requests/approvals; rule violations; pass-thru certifications; FEI
number and information; master product disclosures; rating
information; proxy folder; letters of credit from insurance companies;
notifications of changes in status and actions to be taken; and
advertising and brochures.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years

series_description:
Includes agreements (participation, change, and distribution),
confirmation letters, catch-up provision agreements, notes on
conversations, correspondence, letters to vendors, plan transfers,
financial hardship applications and decisions, calculation sheets for
minimum distribution requirement review, correspondence regarding
over $100,000 insurance, product disclosures, and W-4's.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 20 years

series_description:
Contains documentation of reconciliation process and corrections.
Reconciles data from agency, comptroller, and vendor.
retention_statement: Calendar Year End plus 4 years

series_description:
Includes original contact, application, financial information, reference
check, approval/denial letter, agent verifications and correspondence.
Documents approval/denial process.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_description:
Includes portfolio review, correspondence, and reports for funded or
select pool advisors. Does not included monthly or quarterly billing
invoices from external advisors or managers. (Files related to formal
RFP procurements of managers are covered under OPCO requirements.)
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years

series_description:
Annual and monthly reports include market comment, asset allocation
strategic plan, schedule of securities, summary of transactions, and
portfolios.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 50 years

series_description:
Master Universe List. List of companies indexed by the portfolios in
which they reside.

Quarterly Board reports created by an investment consultant retained
by ERS to analyze and report performance on investments. Also
includes monthly reports prepared by ERS custodian. (Inception to date
data held by the custodian for purposes of preparing the monthly
report shall be held by the custodian indefinitely or until they have
transferred the historical data to a new custodian.)
retention_statement: Calendar Year End plus 10 years

series_description:
Recommends asset allocation. Projects what amounts of
purchases/sales must be made to reach allocation targets. Retained to
show history of allocation decisions and trends in contribuations and
investment income.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_title:
Domestic Equity Trading Cost Execution and
Analysis Records
series_description:
Includes reports on trade details from custodian bank, cost execution
studies from an outside service, and management summary reports.
retention_statement: Calendar Year End plus 7 years

series_description:
Includes Program Activity/Status Report: securities purchased and sold,
revenue generated, and balance in program. Includes Purchase and
Sale Information: sectors, maturity range, and available cash. Also
includes Trader's Implementation/Recommendation Plan: approval
form, cash allocation, analysis of companies, and supporting
documentation.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 1 year

series_description:
Includes voluntary corporate action instructions. Also includes Private
Markets Capital Call and Distribution notices.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Trade Program/aka Buy/Sell Programs. Includes research,
recommendations, memos, and approvals for trading activity for
domestic and global trades. Serves as documentation for Administration
and Operations compliance.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Includes Assignment of Employer ID number by SSA and IRS; Authority
to Sign for Modifications; Inactivated Agreements; Official Register of
State Entity Numbers; Agreements and Modifications; Status Reports of
Inactive Agreements; and Terminations and Termination Waivers of
Hearings.
retention_statement: Permanent
comments:
Filmed for permanent retention after agreement or modification
completed. Master stored at TSLAC. Duplicate maintained in
agency. Storage Approval - Microfilm.

series_description: Includes exception requests and responses.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_title:
Terminated Employee Health Care Account
Cases
series_description:
Includes termination form, account details report, election form,
correspondence, payment envelopes, and account record.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Includes electronic files or logs documenting use of or access to agency
automated systems. Includes documentation of successful and
unsuccessful access attempts, internal and external, by authorized and
unauthorized users. Used to evaluate system security and to identify
specific problems and sources. Provides documentation of violations
that may be used for corrective or legal responses.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_description:
Records created and received by ERS involving Centers for Medicare
and Medicaid Services (CMS) Medicare Part D Retiree Drug Subsidy
payments.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_description:
Records created and received by ERS involving Centers for Medicare
and Medicaid Services (CMS) Medicare payments.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_description:
Provides the minimum timeframes the records must be retained, and
includes instructions for their disposition
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 10 years
comments:
Original is retained for 50 years by the State and Local Records
Management Division, TSLAC.

retention_statement: Until Superseded

series_description:
Charts or diagrams that show the structure of an agency and the
relationships and relative ranks of its departments and job positions.
retention_statement: Until Superseded
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only charts showing the overall arrangement
and administrative structure of the state agency need to be
transferred to the Archives and Information Services Division,
Texas State Library and Archives Commission. Organizational
charts showing division/department level detail are not
considered archival. When updated organization chart is
published, send superseded organization charts to Records &
Information Management for transfer to Archives and
Information Services Division, TSLAC.

series_description:
Applications, resumes, transcripts, letters of reference, and similar
documents whose submission by candidates for vacant positions is
required on the application form, by application procedures, or in the
employment advertisement.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include ADA Accommodation Requests. See
Americans With Disabilities Act (ADA) Documentation AIN 2920
in OS.

series_description:
Internal or external announcements, job postings, or advertisements of
job openings, promotions, or training programs.

Includes notes and/or tapes of interviews with applicants; questions
asked of applicants; results of qualifying tests; applicant scoring and
ranking documents; documentation of reference checks; letters to
executive director justifying selections and recommendations for hiring;
and all other records that document the selection process.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include criminal history checks. See Criminal
History Checks, AIN 2104 in HR.

series_description: Job descriptions for ERS positions.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Includes documentation used to complete EEO reports. Includes
complaints.

Records relating to review and monitoring of job classifications within
ERS.
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 3 years

series_description:
Surveys returned by ERS customers or clients and the statistical data
maintained rating the agency's performance.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
comments:
NOTE: For summary reports compiled from customer surveys,
see Reports and Studies (Non-Fiscal), AIN 1043 in GS.

series_description:
Surveys and statistical data from the biennial Survey of Employee
Engagement (SEE).
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 6 years
comments: Retention is based on maintaining three surveys for comparison.

series_title:
Compliance Documentation for ERS
Employee Personal Investments
series_description:
Includes signed form for pre-approved personal trades and quarterly
Compliance Reports of Personal Investments.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 1 year

series_description:
Includes Investment reference and transaction data. Excludes
Investment performance data.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 14 years
comments:
See Master Files and Application Data, AIN 2152 in IS for non-
investment files.

series_description: Diversity and recruitment plans and related workforce analyses.

W-9 IRS Form used to request a taxpayer identification number (TIN) for
reporting information to the Internal Revenue Service (IRS). This
includes W-9 forms received by a state agency from vendors.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
